_note: Single source of truth for all numeric claims used across multiple documents. Update values HERE; run scripts/sync_canonical_numbers.py to propagate. Agents must never hand-edit README.md / PR_DESCRIPTION.md / BACKEND_EVIDENCE.md numbers directly — always update this file first.

connectblock.wording: ConnectBlock aggregate block validation is ≈0% (within noise) vs libsecp256k1 with Release+LTO (GCC 13). Without LTO: 2.5–5.4% slower due to i-cache pressure.
connectblock.wording_no_lto: Without LTO (RelWithDebInfo): 2.5–5.4% slower than libsecp256k1 due to shim dispatch overhead.

taproot_signing.wording: Taproot key-path signing is 22–24% faster than libsecp256k1.

ct_signing_clang19.wording: CT signing: Clang 19 = 1.20–1.33× faster than libsecp256k1.

_note_exploit_counts: Dynamic counts (exploit PoC, modules) live in docs/canonical_data.json, generated by scripts/build_canonical_data.py. Never duplicate them here.
